set -eu repo=volunteer-hub fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; } git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing." [ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main." [ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits." starterFiles.content:
# Volunteer Hub

Volunteer signups and schedules.

fixtureFiles.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf -- volunteer-hub mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub git -C volunteer-hub init -q -b main git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner' git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s '# Volunteer Hub Volunteer signups and schedules. ' > volunteer-hub/README.md mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s ' Volunteer Hub

Volunteer Signups

' > volunteer-hub/index.html mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 12px; } ' > volunteer-hub/styles.css mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub/notes printf %s 'Orientation: Saturday 10 AM ' > volunteer-hub/notes/schedule.txt git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Start volunteer hub' mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s ' Volunteer Hub

Volunteer Signups and Training

' > volunteer-hub/index.html git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Add volunteer signup page' mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 24px; } ' > volunteer-hub/styles.css git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Add volunteer page styles'

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=volunteer-hub
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The expected unfinished change is missing."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- generated/preview.html || fail 'generated/preview.html should be ignored.'
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- debug.log || fail 'debug.log should be ignored.'
[ -f "$repo/.gitignore" ] || fail '.gitignore is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/.gitignore")" = 'generated/
*.log' ] || fail '.gitignore does not contain the required text.'
[ -f "$repo/generated/preview.html" ] || fail 'generated/preview.html is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/generated/preview.html")" = '' ] || fail 'generated/preview.html does not contain the required text.'
[ -f "$repo/debug.log" ] || fail 'debug.log is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/debug.log")" = '' ] || fail 'debug.log does not contain the required text.'

starterFiles.content:
# Volunteer Hub

Volunteer signups and schedules.

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=volunteer-hub
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The expected unfinished change is missing."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n" '.gitignore
notes/schedule.txt
pages/signup.html' | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- generated/preview.html || fail 'generated/preview.html should be ignored.'
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- debug.log || fail 'debug.log should be ignored.'
[ -f "$repo/.gitignore" ] || fail '.gitignore is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/.gitignore")" = 'generated/
*.log' ] || fail '.gitignore does not contain the required text.'

# Volunteer Hub

Volunteer signups and schedules.

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=volunteer-hub
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 4 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The working tree is not clean yet."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" '.gitignore
README.md
pages/signup.html
styles.css' | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- generated/preview.html || fail 'generated/preview.html should be ignored.'
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- debug.log || fail 'debug.log should be ignored.'
